ham: Dear resident, this is a reminder that your society maintenance bill for June is due on 15th. Kindly clear the amount of Rs. 2000 via UPI <URL> or visit the office. Thank you!
spam: Hi there! 💰 Earn 5000 INR/month from home! No experience needed. Click <URL> to join our exclusive WhatsApp group and start making money today. Hurry, limited spots!
